ticket.subject: Jack Apparel - PluginHive
ticket.description:
Abhilash,

Jeff would like to set up a call to discuss your solution and implement your fulfillment app within shopify.  Below are the services that he will be planning to use:

  *   UPS Ground Saver
  *   UPS Ground
  *   UPS 2nd Day Air

Can you please send over your calendar link so we can get a meeting scheduled to demo your solution and help him setup?

Thank you,

Richard Beaudoin | UPS
Business Development Manager
Cell: 832-297-9856
Email: rbeaudoin@ups.com<mailto:rbeaudoin@ups.com>

comments.body:
Hello Richard & Jack,

Good day!

Abhilash is currently unavailable.

I would be happy to schedule a call to assist you with the setup and address any queries you may have. Please use the appointment link [CLICK HERE] to book a slot at your convenience.

Looking forward to hearing back from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Richard,


Thank you for the introduction and for sharing the details.



I’d be happy to connect with Jeff to walk through our solution and assist with setting up the required UPS services within Shopify.



**I also see that the meeting has already been scheduled, and my colleague Sibi will be leading the onboarding and demo session. He will be sharing the meeting link one hour prior to the session.**



Looking forward to supporting Jeff with the setup.


Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn
comments.html_body:
Hi Richard, 

Thank you for the introduction and for sharing the details. 

I’d be happy to connect with Jeff to walk through our solution and assist with setting up the required UPS services within Shopify. 

I also see that the meeting has already been scheduled, and my colleague Sibi will be leading the onboarding and demo session. He will be sharing the meeting link one hour prior to the session. 

Looking forward to supporting Jeff with the setup.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn
